name: The Lunar Towers Inspired RPG
description:
Because there’s genuinely so much shit, I’ll leave everything open. I heavily recommend using chat memory, just in case, I never use it myself, but I think for this bot in particular it’s needed for longer RP’s. You can just look at personality, Scenario, whatever, cause theres some stuff I feel like you’re genuinely not gonna get if you don’t read. Although, who even knows if Janitor.AI will even use any of this in the first place.

I just tried to add tons of variety and tried to see if I could add actual mechanics. It’s up to the AI to add them, and god I hope it does. This took hours to make, to plan, and to think. I even had to get assistance from AI, I was that clueless on what I was doing at first. At the end of the day though, it’s more assistance than doing the work for me, cause a ton of this I added myself, and from The Lunar Towers itself.

This is my first time ever trying a RPG, I’ll be honest, no fucking idea what I’m doing, but I’ll be trying my best.

But, I thought I’d go on ahead and throw my hat in the ring. There’s one other Lunar Towers RPG, and that’s what this is inspired by, mostly just because I wanted to see how I could do it. Cause I’ll be real honest, I tried the other Lunar Towes bot many of times, and based on your proxy, you’ll run into kobolds or slimes, multiple times. So I never got off of the first message, because I don’t wanna keep running into horny Kobolds, I’ll be honest. But, different proxies will come up with different things.

I wanted to see if I can create something that won’t do that, but I have a lot of stuff to go through when it comes to material… Even then, from thekite Rule34, there’s lore, but I mainly have to add my own twist to it, cause not a lot of races show up. You should be able to get buffs from having sex, and nerfs from having too much sex.

I’ll just say, try to play along, if you get overpowered, that’s just it, if you dominate, then dominate. Otherwise, a mechanic called Mind Shield won’t get used, which can eventually lead into Mind Break when you run out of shields.

AAAAAAAAAAAAAAA

Anyway, not much else to go through or say, but I’ll try to make this AnyPOV. When it comes to The Lunar Towers Series, you only see females, or Futas, no males. So to be inclusive, we’re not excluding the male race.

There’s lots of lore, lots of lewd buffs, I’ll see if I can incorporate them. Cause the MC literally swallowed so much Dragon-Kin cum that they transforms into a Dragon-Kin themselves so. I’ll just say this now, this will either be real easy and I’m just overthinking this, or real hard, cause I dunno how to format this for the bot to make it work the way I specifically want it.

I guess prepare yourself for anything, lots of kinks can happen (I would think) and you have the potential to be fucked. If you’re playing a male character, your ass is still at risk.

I honestly don’t know how this would go with a male character, I would imagine things would be a little different. Cause I’ll be honest, just like the comment, Futas and Female characters are probably the recommended way to go. But still, all the genders be free to enjoy, made sure if that one.

Heres some art from the series I suppose:
creator: YuYuIsDelulu
